name: python3-bitstruct
title: python3-bitstruct
description:
Python bit pack/unpack package
This module is intended to have a similar interface as the Python struct
module, but working on bits instead of primitive data types (char, int, ...).
.
This package contains the Python 3 module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-bitstruct because Python bit pack/unpack package.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-bitstruct as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-bitstruct with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-bitstruct --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
